node.label: Claude: Add test data pipeline, sample CSV generators, and Phas
node.content:
hash: 323bf5f
author: Rishab741 <crishab07@gmail.com>
agent: Claude
branch: unknown
message: Add test data pipeline, sample CSV generators, and Phase 1 engine endpoints
body:
- webapp/app/dashboard/pipeline/page.tsx: 4-step visual pipeline — upload holdings/transactions CSVs (or use auto-generated sample data), run sync+compute, then navigate to live results
- webapp/lib/sample-data.ts: browser-side Schwab CSV generators (9 positions, 57 transactions, 2024-2026) — no brokerage account needed
- services/engine/routers/portfolio.py: add GET /status and POST /refresh endpoints; /refresh accepts user JWT and runs price sync + metric compute for the authenticated user
- services/engine/models/portfolio.py: add PipelineStatus and RefreshResult Pydantic models
- webapp/lib/engine.ts: add HealthScoreResponse, WhatIfResponse, PortfolioExposure, PortfolioHistory, RefreshResult, PipelineStatus types + all new client methods
- webapp/components/sidebar.tsx: add Test Pipeline nav item (GitBranch icon)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
changes: +728 -3
files:
  services/engine/models/portfolio.py
  services/engine/routers/portfolio.py
  webapp/app/dashboard/pipeline/page.tsx
  webapp/components/sidebar.tsx
  webapp/lib/engine.ts
  webapp/lib/sample-data.ts
co-authors: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

node.label: Claude: Fix auth: validate JWT via Supabase Auth API instead of
node.content:
hash: a07b2f5
author: Rishab741 <crishab07@gmail.com>
agent: Claude
branch: unknown
message: Fix auth: validate JWT via Supabase Auth API instead of python-jose
body:
The Supabase project uses RS256 signing which python-jose rejected with
'The specified alg value is not allowed' when only HS256 was in the allow list.

Replace local jwt.decode() with get_db().auth.get_user(token) which calls
Supabase Auth server-side — works for both HS256 and RS256, no local secret
or algorithm guessing needed. python-jose import removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
changes: +17 -23
files:
  services/engine/middleware/auth.py
co-authors: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
node.metadata:
{"commit_hash":"a07b2f51be2d2545a18ba699e7dba263247bb2eb","short_hash":"a07b2f5","agent":"claude","agent_display":"Claude","branch":"unknown","author_name":"Rishab741","author_email":"crishab07@gmail.com","message":"Fix auth: validate JWT via Supabase Auth API instead of python-jose","body":"The Supabase project uses RS256 signing which python-jose rejected with
'The specified alg value is not allowed' when only HS256 was in the allow list.

Replace local jwt.decode() with get_db().auth.get_user(token) which calls
Supabase Auth server-side — works for both HS256 and RS256, no local secret
or algorithm guessing needed. python-jose import removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>","files_changed":["services/engine/middleware/auth.py"],"insertions":17,"deletions":23,"co_authors":["Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"],"timestamp":1779154653000}

node.label: Claude: Bridge Phase 1 critical gaps: Sentry, RLS tests, load t
node.content:
hash: 54f89f6
author: Rishab741 <crishab07@gmail.com>
agent: Claude
branch: unknown
message: Bridge Phase 1 critical gaps: Sentry, RLS tests, load test, data freshness SLA
body:
Engine:
- Add Sentry SDK (fastapi integration, 5% trace sampling, PII disabled)
- Add SENTRY_DSN to config (no-op when blank, no startup failure)
- Add snapshot_age_hours + is_data_stale to PerformanceMetrics model
- Compute staleness in portfolio router (stale = latest snapshot >24h old)

Tests:
- test_calculations_real_data.py: 24 tests using embedded S&P 500 monthly
  closes (2022 bear -19.44%, 2023 bull +24%). Catches compounding errors in
  TWR by asserting chain-link telescopes exactly to (end/start - 1).
  Verifies 2022 max drawdown at -24.77% (Jan peak to Sep trough).
- test_rls_isolation.py: direct Supabase-client RLS tests bypassing the API.
  Covers all user-scoped + account-scoped tables, write protection, and
  anonymous access. Auto-skips when local Supabase creds are not set.
- locustfile.py: Locust load test at 500 concurrent users (JWT + API key
  user types). Fails CI if error rate >1% or p95 >3000ms.

Webapp:
- Add @sentry/nextjs with client/server/edge configs (PII disabled, 5% traces)
- Wrap next.config.js with withSentryConfig for source map upload
- Add global-error.tsx + app/dashboard/error.tsx error boundaries that
  report to Sentry and show context-aware messages (stale data / auth expired)
- Show yellow staleness banner on dashboard when is_data_stale is true
- Add snapshot_age_hours + is_data_stale to PortfolioMetrics TS interface

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
changes: +1099 -13
files:
  services/engine/config.py
  services/engine/main.py
  services/engine/models/portfolio.py
  services/engine/requirements.txt
  services/engine/routers/portfolio.py
  services/engine/tests/locustfile.py
  services/engine/tests/test_calculations_real_data.py
  services/engine/tests/test_rls_isolation.py
  webapp/app/dashboard/error.tsx
  webapp/app/dashboard/page.tsx
  webapp/app/global-error.tsx
  webapp/lib/engine.ts
  webapp/next.config.js
  webapp/package.json
  webapp/sentry.client.config.ts
  webapp/sentry.edge.config.ts
  webapp/sentry.server.config.ts
co-authors: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

node.label: Claude: Fix Sentry event delivery for engine and webapp
node.content:
hash: 571ad50
author: Rishab741 <crishab07@gmail.com>
agent: Claude
branch: unknown
message: Fix Sentry event delivery for engine and webapp
body:
Four root causes were preventing events from reaching Sentry:
1. engine/config.py: add extra="ignore" so pydantic-settings doesn't reject ENGINE_URL and other non-engine env vars — was crashing on startup
2. engine/main.py: add explicit sentry_sdk.capture_exception() in global_exception_handler — FastAPI intercepts before Sentry middleware sees it
3. webapp/next.config.js: remove tunnelRoute="/monitoring" — it returns 404 in next dev, silently dropping all browser events
4. All sentry configs: fix tracesSampleRate to 1.0 in dev (was 0.05, dropping 95% of events)

Also adds instrumentation.ts (required for Sentry in Next.js 14 App Router) and
bumps sentry.client.config.ts to enable Session Replay with full dev visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
changes: +2795 -182
files:
  services/engine/config.py
  services/engine/main.py
  webapp/instrumentation.ts
  webapp/next.config.js
  webapp/package-lock.json
  webapp/package.json
  webapp/sentry.client.config.ts
  webapp/sentry.edge.config.ts
  webapp/sentry.server.config.ts
co-authors: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
node.metadata:
{"commit_hash":"571ad509b444bb4356b72f145ed64673a5712f49","short_hash":"571ad50","agent":"claude","agent_display":"Claude","branch":"unknown","author_name":"Rishab741","author_email":"crishab07@gmail.com","message":"Fix Sentry event delivery for engine and webapp","body":"Four root causes were preventing events from reaching Sentry:

3. webapp/next.config.js: remove tunnelRoute="/monitoring" — it returns 404 in next dev, silently dropping all browser events
4. All sentry configs: fix tracesSampleRate to 1.0 in dev (was 0.05, dropping 95% of events)

Also adds instrumentation.ts (required for Sentry in Next.js 14 App Router) and

node.label: Claude: Fix JWT validation and Sentry debug warning
node.content:
hash: c183c3e
author: Rishab741 <crishab07@gmail.com>
agent: Claude
branch: unknown
message: Fix JWT validation and Sentry debug warning
body:
- auth.py: disable aud verification in python-jose (Supabase aud format varies by project config, causing silent JWTError → 401); add warning log so failures are visible in engine stdout
- sentry.client.config.ts: set debug:false (debug:true requires the Sentry debug bundle not included in prod builds, causing a console warning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
changes: +6 -5
files:
  services/engine/middleware/auth.py
  webapp/sentry.client.config.ts
co-authors: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

node.label: Claude: Add Global Market Alpha Screen with Alpha Vantage integ
node.content:
hash: 3095494
author: Rishab741 <crishab07@gmail.com>
agent: Claude
branch: unknown
message: Add Global Market Alpha Screen with Alpha Vantage integration
body:
- webapp/lib/alpha-vantage.ts: server-side Alpha Vantage client with 5-min in-process cache, parsers for all endpoints, realistic demo fallback data (works without API key)
- webapp/app/api/market/route.ts: aggregated JSON endpoint — parallel-fetches sessions, quotes (SPY/QQQ/GLD/EUR/USD), sector performance, top movers, news sentiment; cached at CDN level
- webapp/app/dashboard/markets/page.tsx: full-screen alpha cockpit — sticky session bar (per-exchange open/closed badges with pulse animation), Fear & Greed SVG gauge derived from sector momentum, 5 index cards with synthetic sparklines, world region heatmap (16 indices across Americas/Europe/Asia/EM color-coded by 24h change intensity), sector rotation horizontal bar chart, top gainers/losers feed, news sentiment feed with bullish/bearish ratio bar; SWR polling every 5 min; glassmorphism dark design (Synthetic Ether aesthetic)
- sidebar.tsx: add Alpha Screen nav link (Globe icon)

Add ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY to .env.local for live data; falls back to demo automatically

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
changes: +794 -1
files:
  webapp/app/api/market/route.ts
  webapp/app/dashboard/markets/page.tsx
  webapp/components/sidebar.tsx
  webapp/lib/alpha-vantage.ts
co-authors: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
